title: tragia cordifolia var. cinerea
intro: Tragia cordifolia var. cinerea is a variant of the Tragia cordifolia plant, a type of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Tragia cordifolia var. cinerea can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder for use in traditional medicine.
